TWM ASSOCIATES FIRM

We know that realizing creative projects requires a unique combination of drive, ambition, skill and technical of knowing-how so at TWM Associates, we only hire the best to ensure we provide a turnkey solution for our clients that is both realistic and extraordinary. We pride ourselves on turning in projects on-time and within budget so if you would like to contact some of our hundreds of satisfied clients then please let us know. We have full confidence that whoever you speak to you will say nothing but ringing endorsements. 

WHO WE ARE

We are one of the best leading firms in the Tshwane area specializing in customer oriented designs and project management to make your dream home and business a reality. We have unique expertise in the areas of new buildings and additions / alterations and have been operating since 1998. We have assisted hundreds of clients across multiple industries including private clients, churches, schools and government institutions.

WE ARE INDEPENDENTLY FIRM

The firm operates independently and has been formed to assist in the handling of all the necessary aspects in the development and maintenance of marginalized communities. Its management services provide a wide spectrum of the needs of communities. With the aid of modern technology, we are able to play a significant role in promoting growth and development where the use of our skills and resources encourage upliftment and employment. Our company is just as excited as you are to get started on the projects. Before commencement of work, we introduce ourselves and outline what to expect from TWM Associates and being made aware of your budget. Our company is confident that we can meet your needs. 

WE ARE EXPERIENCED FIRM

Our company is here to provide you with all the possible support and successfully solving the challenges that you face out there with our high services, excellent, and efficient consulting services. The firm have a team of competent and well-trained professionals, which would try to help you with consulting to all possible extents. We are competent enough company to deal with any kind of such business. The founder (Mr Tshepo William Malemela) himself, is a professional engineer, and is having profound knowledge in the engineering business. His team that is working alongside is also well to do with such a company and is highly efficient in providing the best service possible. 

DISCLAIMER
Our Pledged

As architectural and engineering practitioners, we take deep pride in our professions. We practice integrity and fair dealing, tolerance and respect and to uphold devotion to the standards and dignity of our professions, conscious always that our skills carry with them, the obligation to serve the public good. We always comply with all NBR, NHBRC and Local Authorities by-laws and regulations. This includes health and safety legislations and all architecture and engineering orders of safety departments.

Any services rendered, that are in addition to or beyond the scope of work required by initial agreement will be billed separately. In consideration for the visiting Consulting Services, the Client shall pay consulting costs.
